---
title: Prepare for March 19 lecture
---

<br>

📖 Read Sections 1-3 of [Practical Hilbert space approximate Bayesian Gaussian processes for probabilistic programming](pdfs/riutort-mayol-2020.pdf) by Riutort-Mayol et al. 2022. **You don’t need to fully understand everything in the paper!**

✅ Work on [HW 04](https://biostat725-sp26.netlify.app/hw/hw-04) which is due next **Tuesday** before class.
